name: APx Acquisition Corp. I Unit
summary: APx Acquisition Corp. I is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The units consist of one share of Class A common stock and one-third of one redeemable warrant. The company may pursue an initial business combination target in any stage of its corporate evolution or in any industry or sector in the Americas, Europe and Asia Pacific regions.
